summary: Codex host activation tests should compare resolved target paths on Windows because CI temp directories may surface as short paths.
evidence: GitHub verify log on 2026-03-25 showed RUNNER~1 short path in test expectation versus resolved runneradmin path rendered into AGENTS.md.
Commit 4a42127 changed tests/test_install_bundle_codex_host.py to assert target.resolve().

summary: Target-state and workflow-contract changes must be mirrored across Codex and Antigravity host wrappers before release verification.
Release-facing docs can still drift when a referenced checklist exists only locally; clean-clone guards need to assert the tracked checklist file itself.
evidence: docs/release/public-readiness.md referenced docs/release/github-public-switch-checklist.md before that checklist was tracked in git.
